_fixture_note.what: Sanitised, synthetic-named copy of a real lead-gen prospect account (T3, Phase 1 audit-quality plan). Shape preserved, identity removed.
identity_removed: conversion action names that carried the brand
_fixture_note.sampled_not_full: negative_keywords.campaign / .shared hold a representative sample (5 per campaign, 3 per set). negative_keyword_count (9455) and shared_sizes keep the REAL totals - they are what the count-based strength reads. Engine output is identical with the full 1,779 rows.
_fixture_note.verified: analyse_account + select_top_issues produce the same account type, the same overall RAG, the same severity ladder and the same strengths on this fixture as on the real account data it was built from.
